title: lotus corniculatus subsp. hirsutus
intro: Lotus corniculatus subsp. hirsutus, also known as hairy bird's foot trefoil, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the pea family (Fabaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. The plant is rich in flavonoids and saponins, which have been shown to provide various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Hairy bird's foot trefoil can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for various health conditions.
